title: Why does the converting Subitems to Items feature not work?

posts.author: JPBevins (JP Bevins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Converting Subitems to Items just DOES NOT WORK.

What are you trying to achieve

My team uses line items as individual ideas, concepts, and pitches. Subsequently, subitems are each an action item based on the initial item. The columns are different from the line items, and vise versa as we have to track different things.

Why oh why oh dear god whyyyyyyyyy does it give the option to convert subitems to items, as well as offer to translate columns from a subitem column to a different item column IF THE FEATURE JUST DOES NOT WORK?

Why even offer the option if it can’t do it? Just remove the option if no one can make it work.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JPBevins ,

Your can try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app.

It allows you to add a subitem as an item to multiple boards! You just need to make sure that the columns are common on the subitem level and the item level.

Centralize your designs (7)1920×960 218 KB

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co in case you have any questions.

posts.author: jameswood32 (James Wood )
posts.cookedHtml:
The “Converting Subitems to Items” feature may not work due to several common reasons:

  1. Permissions Issue: You might not have the necessary permissions to modify items or subitems in the board or project.

  2. Feature Limitations: Some platforms restrict this feature based on plan type, board settings, or item complexity.

  3. Technical Glitches: Temporary bugs or sync issues can prevent the conversion from processing correctly.

  4. Unsupported Subitem Types: Certain subitem formats or linked data might not be compatible with conversion.

  5. Missing Required Fields: If the target item requires fields that subitems don’t have, the conversion might fail.

To fix it, verify your permissions, check platform documentation for restrictions, refresh or restart the app, and ensure subitems meet conversion criteria.
